---
name: Data refresh request
about: Refresh the perseus_db export shipped in public/api or public/raster
title: "[data] refresh "
labels: data
---

## What needs refreshing

* `public/api/` (which JSON files?)
* `public/raster/` (which overlays?)
* Per-state HTML reports

## Upstream `perseus_db` state

* Schema version expected (`perseus_api_v1`?):
* Engines added or removed:
* Metrics added or removed:

## Reason

Why this refresh now (new calibration, new ecoregion data, new state coverage, etc.).
